crime.value: Murder by poisoning with cocaine laced with strychnine
crime.quote: if the insured was murdered with a dose of cocain containing strychnine would that then result in your company

victim.value: Harry Nichols, insured person whose death triggers insurance investigation
victim.quote: The name that should be on the policy is Harry Nichols. I will have Mrs. Nichols contact you

resolution.value: Case officially solved and closed, celebrated by the investigative team
resolution.quote: the case you called 'The Medusa File' is officially solved and closed

investigator.value: Sergeant Kevin McKenna, police detective investigating with Detective Cynthia Adams and Captain Carol Meyers
investigator.quote: Kevin McKenna looked at Robert Wallace and said, 'Uncle Bob you started the tradition'

red_herring.value: Drug overdose initially appears accidental, but cocaine contains strychnine suggesting murder
red_herring.quote: if the insured was murdered with a dose of cocain containing strychnine would that then result in your company

clue_fairness.value: Scopolamine detection in human hair after administration presented to reader alongside investigator's research
clue_fairness.quote: scopolamine can be detected in the human hair after it is either administered or ingested

social_world.value: Police department hierarchy with gendered role assignments and mentorship networks
social_world.quote: female officers were assigned mostly to the Juvenile Bureau. It was you who went out of the way

reveal_mechanic.value: Forensic drug detection through hair analysis and insurance investigation convergence
reveal_mechanic.quote: scopolamine can be detected in the human hair after it is either administered or ingested

media_and_audience.value: Insurance company scrutiny affects case perception and potential financial outcomes
media_and_audience.quote: it might be a matter for our legal officers to examine and decide

investigator_wound.value: Captain Wallace's most difficult unsolved case that haunted his career, called 'The Medusa File'
investigator_wound.quote: Wallace reveals the one, most difficult case of homicide that he investigated. He called it 'The Medusa File'

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton the medusa file
